nasb.text: but, ‘As the Lord lives, who brought up the sons of Israel from the land of the north and from all the countries where He had banished them.’ For I will restore them to their own land which I gave to their fathers.

esv.text: but ‘As the Lord lives who brought up the people of Israel out of the north country and out of all the countries where he had driven them.’ For I will bring them back to their own land that I gave to their fathers.

cnv.text: “他們卻要指著那領以色列人從北方之地，從他們被趕逐到的各國上來的永活的耶和華起誓。因我要領他們回到自己的土地，就是我從前賜給他們列祖的。

ccb.text: 而是凭把他们从流放之地——北方和列国领回来的永活的耶和华起誓。因为我必领他们回到我赐给他们祖先的地方。”
